steps.title: Set up the x-intercept equation
steps.content:
The x-intercept is where the graph crosses the x-axis, which occurs when $y = 0$. Setting $g(x) = 0$:
$$\frac{4}{9}x - 24 = 0$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Add 24 to both sides:
$$\frac{4}{9}x = 24$$

Multiply both sides by $\frac{9}{4}$ to isolate $x$:
$$x = 24 \cdot \frac{9}{4} = \frac{216}{4} = 54$$

The x-coordinate of the x-intercept is 54.
